basic_details.short_information: Gujarat Technological University (GTU) has released an official notification for Walk-in Interview for 1 Assistant Professor Posts. Eligible candidates can attend the Walk-in Interview on at the GTU office with original documents and self-attested copies.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: Master's degree with 55% marks in Physics or allied subject, NET/SLET/SET or Ph.D. as per UGC regulations 2009/2016
qualification.details: Assistant Professor: A Master's degree with 55% marks (or equivalent) in Physics or concerned/relevant/allied subject from an Indian University or equivalent from accredited foreign university. Besides, must have cleared NET conducted by UGC/CSIR or similar test like SLET/SET or awarded Ph.D. degree as per UGC Regulations 2009/2016 (or exemptions as specified). OR Ph.D. from top 500 ranked foreign university/institution as per QS/THE/ARWU.

faq.question: Q1. What is the post name for the GTU recruitment?
faq.answer: The post name for the Gujarat Technological University (GTU) recruitment is Assistant Professor.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Assistant Professor post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Assistant Professor post in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Walk-in Interview.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Assistant Professor position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary of Rs. 75,000 Per Month.

faq.question: Q5. What are the educational qualifications required for the Assistant Professor post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Master's degree with 55% marks in Physics or an allied subject, along with NET/SLET/SET or a Ph.D. as per UGC regulations.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification.

faq.question: Q7. When is the Walk-in Interview scheduled?
faq.answer: The Walk-in Interview is scheduled to be held on 17 June 2026.

faq.question: Q8. Where will the Walk-in Interview take place?
faq.answer: The Walk-in Interview will take place at the GTU office in Ahmedabad, Gujarat.

faq.question: Q9. What documents should I carry for the Walk-in Interview?
faq.answer: You should carry original documents and self-attested photocopies, including ID proof, educational certificates, and any other relevant documents as specified in the notification.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for this Assistant Professor position?
faq.answer: The job type for this Assistant Professor position is Contractual.
